steps.title: Count the frequency of each distinct number
steps.content:
In the data 5, 5, 5, 5, 9, 9, 9, 14, 14:
  • 5 appears 4 times
  • 9 appears 3 times
  • 14 appears 2 times

steps.title: Match to the correct frequency table
steps.content: A frequency table pairs each unique number with its count. The table listing Number [5, 9, 14] with corresponding Frequency [4, 3, 2] exactly matches our counts. This matches - A is correct.
